employee_detail.no_pay_configs: No services or packages found to configure.
employee_detail.bulk_apply_grade_hint: Pick a grade and currency to automatically create pay configs for all services and packages. Rates are calculated from the base price using grade multipliers (Junior 0.5x, Medior 0.75x, Senior 1.0x).

invoice_management.title: Invoice Management
invoice_management.description: View and manage employee invoices, approve payments, and track invoice status

filters.title: Filters
filters.search_placeholder: Search by invoice number or employee

pay_config_management.title: Global Rates
pay_config_management.description: Manage platform-wide rate defaults applied to all employees by default.
pay_config_management.info_banner: These are global rates that apply to every employee. To set per-employee rates, open an employee's detail page and use the Apply Grade Template feature.
pay_config_management.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this global rate? This action cannot be undone.

pay_config_form.target_hint: Select a service OR a package, not both. This rate will apply to all employees unless they have a per-employee override.
pay_config_form.pay_limits_hint: Optional. Leave as 0 for no limit. If set, the calculated pay will be clamped to this range.

service_management.title: Service Management
service_management.description: View and manage cleaning services, their prices, and configurations
service_management.name: Name
service_management.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this service? This action cannot be undone.

package_management.title: Package Management
package_management.description: View and manage cleaning packages, their prices, and included services
package_management.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this package? This action cannot be undone.

admin_user_management.title: Admin User Management
admin_user_management.description: Manage administrator accounts, create new admins, and control access
admin_user_management.deactivate_confirm: Are you sure you want to deactivate this administrator? They will no longer be able to access the admin panel.
admin_user_management.activate_confirm: Are you sure you want to activate this administrator? They will regain access to the admin panel.

language_management.description: Manage system languages for content translations
